title: solenandra elliptica subsp. monticola
intro: Solenandra elliptica subsp. monticola, also known as the Montane Solenandra, is a plant species native to the mountainous regions of the Philippines, belonging to the family Staphylocactaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Solenandra elliptica subsp. monticola include relief from fever, headache, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to act as an antioxidant. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea or by using the plant in a decoction, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
